extraction.one_line_summary: OLDANI Stefan won from 25-rider breakaway that formed after 70km of 55km/h racing, outsprinting ROTA after both distanced LEMBRES in final kilometer
tactical_patterns: Breakaway only stabilized at 70km after 55km/h opening hour indicating peloton willing to concede stage after sprint day.
OLDANI-ROTA pair attacked with 50km remaining from established break, suggesting secondary selections work better than solo moves.
KELDERMAN group bridging at 11min GC deficit shows teams tolerating breaks only when GC threat neutralized by time gap.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: attempting opportunistic attacks during breakaway formation shows alertness but no sustained strength
rider_signals.BADILATTI: negative: team missing initial break and requiring 70km chase via CABURO/COVILI reveals poor positioning or weakness
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: bridging effort at 11min down confirms he's targeting stages not GC after earlier time losses
rider_signals.LEMBRES: negative: attacked twice in final kilometer but lacked sprint speed, tactical desperation masked physical limitation
